# BuildPriceGambia
> Real-time construction material prices in The Gambia (GMD). Compare supplier prices, find contractors, track price history.

## Key pages
- /search - Search and compare material prices
- /suppliers - Browse verified suppliers
- /contractors - Find contractors by specialty
- /map - Map of suppliers and contractors
- /guides - Construction guides for The Gambia
- /estimator - Project cost estimator
